offer: For construction project managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We simplify the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inefficient reconciliation of subcontractor invoices leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction project managers
